title: IPR Notification 2026 - Apply Offline for Chief Administrative Officer Posts
description: Institute for Plasma Research (IPR) has declaredthe official notification for 2026. To fill up the vacancies for various Chief Administrative Officer Jobs. Here we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, applciation fee, and how to apply for these posts.
